name: Change Control
description: Manages changes to project scope and requirements in a structured way — evaluating impact, getting approvals, and ensuring changes are communicated and implemented without derailing delivery.

variables.name: change_description
variables.description: Description of the change being requested

variables.name: requestor
variables.description: Person or party requesting the change

variables.name: impact_assessment
variables.description: Initial impact assessment of the change

inputs.name: change_description
inputs.description: Description of the change being requested

inputs.name: requestor
inputs.description: Person or party requesting the change

inputs.name: impact_assessment
inputs.description: Initial impact assessment of the change
